narrative:
Willoughby Hills City has 6,893 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.0 percentage points.
